files.patch: @@ -5891,3 +5891,3 @@ - If the frame's method is a value object constructor and - the requested local is the "this" object, the - value_ptr is set to a snapshot of the "this" object. + When preview features are enabled, the frame's method is a value class + constructor and the requested local is a "this" value object, + the value_ptr is set to a snapshot of the "this" object. @@ -5947,2 +5947,3 @@ - If the frame's method is a value object constructor, the - value_ptr is set to a snapshot of the "this" object. + When preview features are enabled, the frame's method is a value class + constructor and the local instance is a value object, + the value_ptr is set to a snapshot of the "this" object. @@ -14140,0 +14141,1 @@ + When preview features are enabled, this event does not supports value object allocations.
